Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "ROBINTOTHERESCUE-6000-1B80" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $6000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Robin to the Rescue (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $6000 which copies 256 bytes of data from $6020 down to $0300 so that the dump can start at $0400. It then jumps to the entry point at $0300 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code).
